name: UNCORPOREAL - "Alcatraz Island Lofts"
short_description: "Alcatraz Island Lofts", an experimental VR short, is a dark comedy monologue set in 2025 San Franciso that imagines a rather cynical solution to San Francisco's housing crisis: converting the historic prison on Alcatraz Island into over-priced lofts. Run length is 1 min 30 secs.
detailed_description:
"Alcatraz Island Lofts", an experimental VR short, is a dark comedy monologue set in 2025 San Franciso that imagines a rather cynical solution to San Francisco's housing crisis and NIMBY ("not in my back yard") dilemma: converting the historic prison on Alcatraz Island into over-priced lofts.
Run length is 1 minute 30 seconds.
about_the_game:
"Alcatraz Island Lofts", an experimental VR short, is a dark comedy monologue set in 2025 San Franciso that imagines a rather cynical solution to San Francisco's housing crisis and NIMBY ("not in my back yard") dilemma: converting the historic prison on Alcatraz Island into over-priced lofts.
Run length is 1 minute 30 seconds.
